title: Japan ramping up defence is 'critical' to prevent war, Defence Minister Koizumi tells BBC
description: Japan needs to revisit the pacifist posture that has defined it since World War Two, Shinjiro Koizumi says.
content:
Japan must "strengthen its defence capabilities", Defence Minister Shinjiro Koizumi has told the BBC, emphasising the need to revisit the pacifist posture that has defined the country since World War Two.
He said boosting defence, "reinforcing its al... [7403 chars]

title: Ebola outbreak in DR Congo: Mourners learn how to grieve and safely bury a body
description: A cemetery at the epicentre of the outbreak is rapidly filling up, however large traditional funerals have been scrapped.
content:
Nyamurongo cemetery in Bunia, a city in north-eastern Democratic Republic of Congo that is the epicentre of the current Ebola outbreak, is much busier than usual.

title: Cervical cancer deaths fall to zero in young women given vaccine
description: A new study finds that hundreds of lives have been saved since school-age girls were offered the HPV jab in 2008.
content:
Around 200 lives have been saved in England so far thanks to a vaccine which protects against cervical cancer, according to analysis published in the Lancet.
The first study of its kind, external showed that deaths have fallen sharply since school-ag... [4317 chars]

title: Powys train crash that killed one and injured four could have been avoided
description: One person described being knocked unconscious before hearing people shouting and seeing people on the floor.
content:
A head-on fatal collision between two trains in mid Wales could have been avoided, an investigation has found.
One passenger died and four other people were seriously injured when two trains collided in the village of Talerddig, Powys, in October 202... [7185 chars]

title: Ghana 1-0 Panama: Ghana's 95th-minute winner denies Panama first World Cup point
description: Ghana score 95th-minute winner to deny Panama their first World Cup point
content:
Ghana's Caleb Yirenkyi scored a 95th-minute winner to deny Panama their first-ever World Cup point in Toronto, Canada.
